# responsible-ai-governance-toolkit

> Responsible AI governance toolkit — EU AI Act, ISO/IEC 42001, NIST AI RMF, plus practical frameworks, controls and checklists for agentic systems.

Generated from https://santismm.com — the single source of truth. Do not edit by hand.

## Governance

- [GOV-004 Agentic AI Governance Checklist](governance/agentic-ai-governance-checklist.md) — canonical: https://santismm.com/en/governance/agentic-ai-governance-checklist
- [GOV-006 Audit Framework for Agentic Systems](governance/audit-framework-for-agentic-systems.md) — canonical: https://santismm.com/en/governance/audit-framework-for-agentic-systems

- [GOV-001 EU AI Act](governance/eu-ai-act.md) — canonical: https://santismm.com/en/governance/eu-ai-act
- [GOV-007 Human Oversight and Accountability Policy](governance/human-oversight-and-accountability-policy.md) — canonical: https://santismm.com/en/governance/human-oversight-and-accountability-policy
